title: ci: deploy operation Cloudflare apps
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
## Summary
- Adds a production deployment workflow for Cloudflare-native operation apps.
- Detects changed operation app folders and deploys only the affected app matrix.
- Supports manual deployment of `all`, `kpi`, or `quest-dashboard`.

## Notes
- This first PR intentionally supports only apps that already exist on `main` and `production`.
- Observability is added separately with the Grafana migration PR.

## Validation
- Parsed workflow YAML locally.
- Verified the app matrix JSON generation locally.
- `git diff --check` passed.

gist.headline: Smooth Sailing to Cloudflare
gist.blurb: We've added a shiny new deployment workflow for our Cloudflare-native operation apps. Now our internal tools like the KPI and Quest dashboards deploy automatically when changed!
gist.summary: Added a GitHub Actions workflow to automatically detect and deploy changes to Cloudflare-native operation apps like the KPI and Quest dashboards.
gist.impact: Internal deployments are now automated and matrix-based, ensuring faster and more reliable updates to operational tools.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot working together on cloud infrastructure. A conveyor belt of code boxes going into a fluffy pastel cloud, representing automated Cloudflare deployments.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-headed robot loading glowing code boxes onto a conveyor belt that leads into a soft pastel cloud. The robot's screen glows with a happy face. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
